name: Peanut Butter Fudge (Shelton)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, milk, and butter in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (234°F or 112°C on a candy thermometer).
2. Remove from heat and stir in salt, vanilla extract, and peanut butter until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture onto buttered plates to cool and set.
Note: The fudge should be turned out onto buttered plates for serving.
